features: Protects against acids coming from sugar
It has an extra fresh mint scent
Protects the 8 essential points controlled by dentists
Suitable for adults and children over 12 years
description: Product Description Oral-B Pro-Expert Professional Protection Toothpaste protects the 8 problems that are most often treated in dentist practices. Contains a tin fluoride complex, an exclusive combination of ingredients. Protects and acts on oral problems such as cavities, plaque, gum problems, sensitivity, spots, bad breath, tartar and enamel erosion. Directions daily teeth cleaning, preventive oral care Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. In case of accidental ingestion, consult a healthcare professional. See more
